song.title: Living, Jesus is Living
song.presentation: V1 V2 C V3 V4 C
song.lyrics: [V1] .D 1) In my life I’d have to say . I’d never dreamed there’d come a day . Bm When God would be so real to me . And I knew what it meant to be . G A D A man, simply loving the Lord. [V2] 2) Praise the Lord, my life’s begun Since I have touched this Living One. I’ve been set free from death and sin So now I gladly give my life to Him, Ever loving the Lord. [C] .A G Chorus Living, Jesus is living, . D A D And He keeps giving Himself to us. .A G Living, Jesus is living, . D A D And He keeps giving Himself to us. [V3] 3) Though the years May come and go, But still Your living presence flows. My friends said it would fade away, But, still, You’re home in me to stay. How rich! Just enjoying the Lord! [V4] 4) Lord Your life is ever new, My heart bursts forth in praise to You. What joy You have to give to man, And peace the world will never understand, Only found in the Son!
